Tue 21-Jul is weekly-expiry day => any entry uses 28-Jul weekly. Draft score +1 (US +1; news/PCR 1.03/FII neutral), below entry threshold 2. Book is flat, so a triggering morning score could open same-day (intraday exit). GIFT Nifty + fresh FII/DII to be confirmed at morning run
